positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical illustration of glowing mystical flora and celestial patterns. The main subjects are stylized, glowing crystalline mushrooms, delicate bioluminescent vines, and swirling constellations, forming a cohesive, repeating, highly detailed pattern. The artwork must have a strong, clean silhouette and perfect symmetry, suitable for a central apparel print. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, midnight blue, and ethereal purple, dramatically contrasted with vibrant neon electric cyan, lime green, and magenta highlights. The style is a sophisticated blend of Art Nouveau organic curves and clean, crisp digital vector illustration, emphasizing negative space and clean linework.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, ugly, deformed, bad anatomy, noise, amateur, grainy, symmetrical break, jpeg artifacts
